EduHorizon

EduHorizon is an education consulting website focused on college admissions guidance in India.

Primary website: https://www.eduhorizon.online/
Sitemap: https://www.eduhorizon.online/sitemap.xml

Important pages:
- Home: https://www.eduhorizon.online/
- About: https://www.eduhorizon.online/about
- Colleges: https://www.eduhorizon.online/colleges
- Success Stories: https://www.eduhorizon.online/success-stories
- Testimonials: https://www.eduhorizon.online/testimonials
- Blog: https://www.eduhorizon.online/blog
- Privacy Policy: https://www.eduhorizon.online/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://www.eduhorizon.online/terms

Blog articles:
- https://www.eduhorizon.online/blog/choosing-right-college
- https://www.eduhorizon.online/blog/engineering-vs-management
- https://www.eduhorizon.online/blog/campus-life-greater-noida

Restricted area:
- https://www.eduhorizon.online/admin/
